nodes.name: Customer Places Order
nodes.notes: Order received via Shopify storefront. Triggers fulfilment workflow automatically.

nodes.name: Order Confirmation & Payment Verification

thresholds.action: Flag order and hold — do not proceed to pick

nodes.notes: Shopify validates payment gateway response. Failed payments must not proceed to warehouse.

nodes.name: Payment Confirmed?
nodes.notes: YES → proceed to stock check. NO → notify customer, cancel or retry payment.

nodes.name: Order Transmitted to WMS
nodes.notes: Shopify pushes confirmed order details to WMS via integration. Pick list generated automatically.

nodes.name: Stock Availability Check

thresholds.action: Trigger back-order process — notify customer of delay

nodes.notes: WMS checks real-time inventory against order line items.

nodes.name: All Items In Stock?
nodes.notes: YES → proceed to picking. NO → initiate back-order for out-of-stock items.

nodes.name: Initiate Back-Order
nodes.notes: Back-order raised in WMS. Customer notified of delay via Shopify automated email. Partial fulfilment considered if some items are in stock.

nodes.name: Order Picking

thresholds.action: Re-pick incorrect items before proceeding to packing

nodes.notes: Picker follows WMS-generated pick list. Barcode scanning recommended to validate each item picked.

nodes.name: Pick Verification

thresholds.action: Halt packing — return incorrect items, re-pick correct items before proceeding

nodes.notes: CCP — incorrect items shipped cannot be recovered without customer return and re-dispatch. Full order verification against pick list required before packing commences.

nodes.name: Order Packing
nodes.notes: Items packed securely. Packing slip inserted. Packaging standard must protect items in transit.

nodes.name: Shipping Label Generation
nodes.notes: Courier integration generates shipping label and tracking number automatically. Label applied to parcel.

nodes.name: Dispatch & Handoff to Courier

thresholds.action: Escalate to Operations Manager — SLA breach risk

nodes.notes: Physical handoff of parcels to courier driver. Proof of collection obtained. Customer notified of dispatch with tracking number via Shopify.

nodes.name: Shipment in Transit

thresholds.action: Monitor tracking — flag delayed shipments to Operations Manager

nodes.notes: Courier manages delivery. Tracking updates fed back via integration. Customer can self-serve tracking via Shopify notification.

nodes.name: Delivery Attempted?
nodes.notes: YES → delivered successfully, proceed to order closure. NO → courier manages re-delivery or returns parcel to warehouse.

nodes.name: Failed Delivery — Return to Warehouse
nodes.notes: Courier returns undelivered parcel to warehouse. Warehouse team inspects and restocks or re-dispatches. Customer contacted to arrange re-delivery or refund.

nodes.name: Order Closure & Records Update
nodes.notes: Order marked as fulfilled in Shopify and WMS. Inventory levels updated. Delivery confirmation recorded. Process complete.

nodes.name: Reconcile DC Container Balance with Sales Recon

thresholds.action: Investigate discrepancy and resolve within 48 hours

nodes.notes: Cross-validates distributor container balances against sales records to identify data integrity issues

nodes.name: Production & Supply Planning Process
nodes.notes: Trigger: start of monthly planning cycle. Initiates both sub-processes sequentially.

nodes.name: Sub-Process 1: Demand & Production Planning
nodes.notes: Sub-process boundary: Demand & Production Planning. Owned by Planning department.

nodes.name: Receive & Validate Demand Signal

thresholds.parameter: Forecast accuracy vs prior month actuals
thresholds.action: Escalate to Planning Manager for manual demand review before proceeding
Reject signal and request refresh from Commercial team

nodes.notes: Demand signal sourced from ERP/S&OP output. Validate completeness, SKU coverage and forecast age before proceeding to MPS.

nodes.name: Demand Signal Acceptable?
nodes.notes: YES → proceed to MPS generation. NO → return to Supply Planner for demand signal correction. Max 1 retry loop before Planning Manager escalation.

nodes.name: Generate Master Production Schedule (MPS)
nodes.notes: MPS generated in ERP using validated demand signal. Output: time-phased production quantities by SKU and production line.

nodes.name: Validate Production Capacity Against MPS

thresholds.action: Flag capacity breach to Planning Manager. MPS must be revised or alternative capacity sourced before lock.

thresholds.parameter: Unplanned downtime allowance built into schedule
thresholds.action: If buffer below 5%, Production Scheduler must flag risk to Plant Manager before MPS approval.

nodes.notes: CCP: capacity overcommitment at this stage cannot be corrected once supplier orders are placed downstream. Human confirmation required. Loop confirm enabled.

nodes.name: Capacity Adequate?
nodes.notes: YES → approve MPS and proceed. NO → return to S4 for MPS revision. Maximum 2 revision cycles before escalation to Planning Manager and Plant Manager joint review.

nodes.name: Approve & Lock Master Production Schedule
nodes.notes: Formal MPS lock. Dual sign-off required: Planning Manager + Plant Manager. Locked MPS triggers Sub-Process 2 (Supply & Materials Planning). Record retained in ERP.

nodes.name: Handoff: Locked MPS to Supply & Materials Planning
nodes.notes: Ownership transfers from Planning to Procurement/Supply. Locked MPS and capacity-confirmed schedule transmitted to Procurement via ERP. Sub-Process 1 closes here.

nodes.name: Sub-Process 2: Supply & Materials Planning
nodes.notes: Sub-process boundary: Supply & Materials Planning. Owned by Procurement department. Triggered by locked MPS from S8.

nodes.name: Run Material Requirements Planning (MRP)
nodes.notes: ERP-generated MRP run against locked MPS. Output: planned purchase orders, replenishment requirements, and material shortage report by RM/PM code.

nodes.name: Review & Validate MRP Output

thresholds.action: Any coverage gap must be escalated to Procurement Manager within 24 hours for expedite or substitution review.

thresholds.parameter: Number of critical material shortages flagged
thresholds.action: Any critical shortage triggers immediate escalation to Planning Manager and Plant Manager for MPS impact assessment.

nodes.notes: Buyer reviews MRP output for exceptions, shortages, and lead time conflicts. Critical shortages must not proceed without escalation.

nodes.name: Material Availability Confirmed?
nodes.notes: YES → proceed to supplier order placement. NO → escalate to joint Planning/Procurement review for MPS re-sequencing or expedite action. Document resolution.

nodes.name: Issue Purchase Orders to Suppliers

thresholds.parameter: PO issued within lead time window
thresholds.action: Late PO issuance must be approved by Procurement Manager with documented risk impact.

nodes.notes: POs issued via ERP against approved supplier list. All POs require Procurement Manager authorisation above defined value threshold (assumed ≥£10,000).

nodes.name: Confirm Supplier Delivery Commitments

thresholds.action: Unconfirmed POs after 2 days: Buyer to chase. After 4 days: Procurement Manager escalates or activates secondary supplier.

thresholds.parameter: On-time delivery commitment vs required date
thresholds.action: Any late delivery commitment must be assessed for MPS impact by Supply Planner within 24 hours.

nodes.notes: All POs must have written supplier confirmation of delivery date. Unconfirmed orders are a material planning risk — monitored weekly thereafter.

nodes.name: Supply Plan Review & Sign-Off
nodes.notes: Formal supply plan sign-off. All POs placed, supplier confirmations received, and material coverage validated. Output distributed to Planning and Production for execution readiness.

nodes.name: Production & Supply Planning Process Complete
nodes.informed: Plant Manager, Procurement Manager, Supply Planner, Production Scheduler, Buyer
nodes.notes: Process close. Locked MPS and confirmed supply plan handed to Production Scheduling and Warehouse for execution. Monthly cycle complete. Next cycle triggered Day 1 of following month.

nodes.name: PO Funding Request Submission
nodes.notes: Approved PO is submitted to Treasury via ERP for funding confirmation. PO must carry approval stamp and cost centre code.

nodes.name: Payment Instruction & Scheduling

thresholds.action: Escalate to Treasury Manager if instruction is not issued within 24 hours of budget sign-off.

nodes.notes: Treasury issues bank transfer instruction aligned to supplier payment terms. Instruction is passed to AP for execution.

nodes.name: 3-Way Invoice Match

thresholds.parameter: Invoice vs PO vs GRN value variance
thresholds.action: Place invoice on hold. Notify Procurement Officer and supplier. Resolve discrepancy before proceeding. Do not release payment.

nodes.notes: CCP — Matches supplier invoice against approved PO and Goods Receipt Note (GRN). Failure at this point cannot be recovered post-payment. Tolerance set at 0.5% variance.

nodes.name: Payment Execution & Bank Transfer

thresholds.parameter: Payment value match to approved instruction
thresholds.action: Halt payment. Notify AP Supervisor and Treasury Manager immediately. Do not proceed until discrepancy is resolved.

nodes.notes: Bank transfer executed via ERP/banking platform. Payment amount, beneficiary account and reference must match Treasury instruction exactly.

nodes.name: Budget Availability Check

thresholds.action: Escalate to CFO if budget coverage falls below 100%. PO to be placed on hold.

nodes.notes: Treasury verifies cash availability and budget line coverage before releasing PO for payment processing.

nodes.name: Supplier Verification Check

thresholds.action: Halt PO submission. Escalate to Procurement Manager and Legal & Compliance for supplier revalidation.

nodes.notes: Confirms supplier is active, bank details are verified, and no sanctions or blacklist flags exist. Anti-bribery and KYS check applied.

nodes.name: Delegation of Authority Confirmation

thresholds.parameter: PO value vs approved authority level
thresholds.action: Escalate to next approval tier per Delegation of Authority matrix. Do not proceed until correct authority has approved.

nodes.notes: Confirms PO value is within the signatory's approved authority level per the current Delegation of Authority (DoA) policy.

nodes.name: Payment Execution & Remittance

thresholds.action: Halt payment and notify AP Supervisor and Treasury Manager if value discrepancy detected.

nodes.notes: AP executes bank transfer and issues remittance advice to supplier. Payment reference is reconciled against PO number in ERP.

nodes.name: Payment Terms & Scheduling Confirmation

thresholds.parameter: Payment due date vs supplier terms
thresholds.action: Escalate to Treasury Manager if payment scheduling breaches agreed supplier terms.

nodes.notes: Confirms payment due date against supplier contract terms (e.g. Net 30/60). Schedules payment run accordingly.

nodes.name: Treasury Payment Instruction Issuance
nodes.notes: Formal payment instruction issued to AP via ERP, including payment amount, bank transfer details, value date and PO reference.

nodes.name: Duplicate Payment Check

thresholds.action: Immediately halt payment. Escalate to AP Supervisor and Treasury Manager. Log incident for audit trail.

nodes.notes: CCP — ERP system checks for duplicate invoice number, supplier reference and payment amount combination. Any match halts processing immediately.

nodes.name: Payment Approval & Dual Authorisation

thresholds.action: Do not release payment. Obtain second authorisation per dual-control policy.

nodes.notes: Dual authorisation required for all payments above defined threshold per internal controls policy. Single-signatory payments above threshold are a control violation.

nodes.name: Tax & Withholding Compliance Check

thresholds.action: Halt payment. Notify Tax Manager for correction. Do not release until tax treatment is confirmed.

nodes.notes: Validates VAT, withholding tax and any applicable statutory deductions per local tax regulations before payment release.

nodes.name: Remittance Advice Issuance
nodes.notes: Remittance advice issued to supplier via email or supplier portal confirming payment amount, date, PO reference and invoice number.

nodes.name: ERP Reconciliation & Ledger Update

thresholds.action: Raise reconciliation exception. Notify AP Supervisor and Treasury Analyst. Investigate and resolve within 48 hours.

nodes.notes: ERP automatically posts payment to supplier ledger and updates bank account balance. Reconciliation report generated for Finance Director review.

nodes.name: Payment Audit Trail & Record Closure
nodes.notes: Full audit trail archived: PO, GRN, invoice, match result, approvals, payment instruction, bank confirmation and remittance. Closed record made available to Internal Audit.

nodes.name: Supplier Onboarding Process — START
nodes.notes: Triggered by business need for new supplier. Initiating department submits formal request.

nodes.name: PROCUREMENT — Supplier Identification & Screening
nodes.notes: SUB-PROCESS HEADER — Procurement SP1

nodes.name: Receive & Log Supplier Request
nodes.notes: Procurement Analyst logs request in the supplier management system. Assigns unique Supplier Request ID. SLA: completed within 1 business day of receipt.

nodes.name: Conduct Initial Supplier Market Screening
nodes.notes: Research potential suppliers via approved vendor databases, trade directories and internal referrals. Minimum 3 candidates identified.

nodes.name: Perform Preliminary Sanctions & Blacklist Check

thresholds.action: Immediately reject supplier and escalate to Compliance Officer. Document findings and close request.

nodes.notes: CCP — any sanctions match results in immediate disqualification. Check run against OFAC, UN, EU and internal blacklists. Failure cannot be recovered downstream.

nodes.name: Screen Pass / Fail Decision
nodes.notes: YES — proceed to Supplier Evaluation. NO — reject and notify requesting department with reason.

nodes.name: PROCUREMENT — Supplier Evaluation & Approval
nodes.notes: SUB-PROCESS HEADER — Procurement SP2

nodes.name: Issue Supplier Questionnaire (RFI)
nodes.notes: Standard RFI template issued to shortlisted suppliers. Covers: financial stability, certifications, capacity, ESG credentials. Response deadline: 10 business days.

nodes.name: Score & Rank Supplier Responses

thresholds.action: Suppliers scoring below 70 are disqualified. Procurement Manager documents reason and notifies requesting department.

nodes.notes: Weighted scorecard applied across: quality (30%), commercial (25%), delivery (20%), ESG (15%), financial stability (10%).

nodes.name: Procurement Approval — Preferred Supplier Designation
nodes.informed: Legal Director, Finance Director, Requesting Department Head
nodes.notes: Procurement Director formally approves preferred supplier. Approval recorded in system with digital sign-off. Triggers handoff to Legal.

nodes.name: Handoff — Procurement to Legal
nodes.notes: System-generated handoff notification sent to Legal. Package includes: Supplier Request ID, RFI responses, evaluation scorecard, Procurement approval record.

nodes.name: LEGAL — Contract Drafting & Review
nodes.notes: SUB-PROCESS HEADER — Legal SP1

nodes.name: Select & Customise Contract Template
nodes.notes: Legal selects appropriate master template (goods / services / strategic). Customisation based on category, geography and risk tier. Non-standard clauses require Legal Director sign-off.

nodes.name: Internal Contract Review & Red-Line

thresholds.action: All high-risk issues must be resolved or formally accepted before progressing. Escalate unresolved issues to Legal Director and Procurement Director.

nodes.notes: Internal red-line review covering: liability caps, IP ownership, termination rights, GDPR clauses, indemnity. SLA: 5 business days.

nodes.name: Issue Contract to Supplier & Negotiate
nodes.notes: Draft issued to supplier. Negotiation window: max 10 business days. All versions version-controlled in contract management system.

nodes.name: Contract Execution — Dual Signature
nodes.informed: Procurement Director, Finance Director, Compliance Officer
nodes.notes: Executed via e-signature platform (dual signature: Legal Director + Supplier authorised signatory). Signed contract stored in contract management system immediately.

nodes.name: LEGAL — Compliance & Risk Verification
nodes.notes: SUB-PROCESS HEADER — Legal SP2

nodes.name: Verify Supplier Regulatory Certifications

thresholds.action: Halt onboarding. Supplier must provide valid certifications before process continues. Escalate to Legal Director and Procurement Director.

nodes.notes: CCP — Verify mandatory certifications: ISO, food safety (if applicable), data protection, industry-specific licences. Expired or missing certs halt onboarding.

nodes.name: Conduct Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) Risk Assessment

thresholds.action: Tier 3 suppliers require CFO and Legal Director approval before proceeding. Additional EDD documentation mandatory.

nodes.notes: Risk tiering based on: spend value, geographic risk, data access, sole-source dependency, ESG exposure.

nodes.name: EDD Outcome Decision — Proceed or Escalate
nodes.notes: YES (Tier 1–2) — proceed to contract drafting in parallel. NO (Tier 3) — escalate for senior approval before continuing.

nodes.name: Handoff — Legal to Finance
nodes.notes: System-generated handoff to Finance. Package includes: executed contract, compliance verification record, EDD risk assessment, Supplier Request ID.

nodes.name: FINANCE — Supplier Master Data Setup
nodes.notes: SUB-PROCESS HEADER — Finance SP1

nodes.name: Create Supplier Record in ERP / Financial System
nodes.notes: Supplier master record created in ERP (SAP / Oracle / equivalent). Fields: legal entity name, registered address, VAT/tax ID, payment terms, currency, GL account mapping.

nodes.name: Four-Eyes Check — Master Data Accuracy Verification

thresholds.action: Return to Accounts Payable Specialist for correction. Re-verification required before activation.

nodes.notes: Mandatory four-eyes check on all master data fields. Checker must be different person from creator. Digital sign-off required.

nodes.name: Activate Supplier Record in ERP
nodes.notes: Finance Manager activates supplier record. System generates unique Supplier Master ID. Activation logged with timestamp and user ID.

nodes.name: FINANCE — Payment Terms & Banking Validation
nodes.notes: SUB-PROCESS HEADER — Finance SP2

nodes.name: Collect & Verify Supplier Banking Details

thresholds.action: Do not activate payment capability until bank details are independently verified. Escalate to Finance Director immediately if verification fails or details are disputed.

nodes.notes: CCP — Bank account name, number, sort code/IBAN/SWIFT verified directly with supplier via phone callback protocol (not email). Prevents payment fraud / BEC attacks. Failure cannot be recovered post-payment.

nodes.name: Confirm & Load Agreed Payment Terms

thresholds.parameter: Payment Terms Match — Contract vs ERP
thresholds.action: Mismatch must be corrected and re-verified before supplier activation. Escalate discrepancy to Finance Manager and Procurement Manager.

nodes.notes: Payment terms loaded must exactly match executed contract (e.g. Net 30, Net 60, early payment discount). System-enforced cross-check against contract record.

nodes.name: Finance Approval — Supplier Payment Readiness Sign-Off
nodes.notes: Finance Director formally approves supplier for payment. Digital sign-off in ERP. CFO informed for spend above defined threshold (configurable per policy).

nodes.name: Notify All Stakeholders — Supplier Active
nodes.informed: All Departments, Requesting Department Head, Supplier Relationship Manager
nodes.notes: System-generated notification confirms supplier is fully onboarded and active. Includes: Supplier Master ID, contract reference, payment terms summary, assigned Supplier Relationship Manager.

nodes.name: Supplier Onboarding Process — END
nodes.notes: Process complete. Target end-to-end cycle time: 39 business days. KPI: % onboarded within target. Onboarding record archived. Supplier enters standard Vendor Management cycle.

nodes.notes: All POs must have written supplier confirmation of delivery date. Unconfirmed orders are a material planning risk — monitored weekly thereafter.

nodes.name: Supply Plan Review & Sign-Off
nodes.notes: Formal supply plan sign-off. All POs placed, supplier confirmations received, and material coverage validated. Output distributed to Planning and Production for execution readiness.

nodes.name: Production & Supply Planning Process Complete
nodes.informed: Plant Manager, Procurement Manager, Supply Planner, Production Scheduler, Buyer
nodes.notes: Process close. Locked MPS and confirmed supply plan handed to Production Scheduling and Warehouse for execution. Monthly cycle complete. Next cycle triggered Day 1 of following month.

nodes.name: PO Funding Request Submission
nodes.notes: Approved PO is submitted to Treasury via ERP for funding confirmation. PO must carry approval stamp and cost centre code.

nodes.name: Payment Instruction & Scheduling

thresholds.action: Escalate to Treasury Manager if instruction is not issued within 24 hours of budget sign-off.

nodes.notes: Treasury issues bank transfer instruction aligned to supplier payment terms. Instruction is passed to AP for execution.

nodes.name: 3-Way Invoice Match

thresholds.parameter: Invoice vs PO vs GRN value variance
thresholds.action: Place invoice on hold. Notify Procurement Officer and supplier. Resolve discrepancy before proceeding. Do not release payment.

nodes.notes: CCP — Matches supplier invoice against approved PO and Goods Receipt Note (GRN). Failure at this point cannot be recovered post-payment. Tolerance set at 0.5% variance.

nodes.name: Payment Execution & Bank Transfer

thresholds.parameter: Payment value match to approved instruction
thresholds.action: Halt payment. Notify AP Supervisor and Treasury Manager immediately. Do not proceed until discrepancy is resolved.

nodes.notes: Bank transfer executed via ERP/banking platform. Payment amount, beneficiary account and reference must match Treasury instruction exactly.

nodes.name: Budget Availability Check

thresholds.action: Escalate to CFO if budget coverage falls below 100%. PO to be placed on hold.

nodes.notes: Treasury verifies cash availability and budget line coverage before releasing PO for payment processing.

nodes.name: Supplier Verification Check

thresholds.action: Halt PO submission. Escalate to Procurement Manager and Legal & Compliance for supplier revalidation.

nodes.notes: Confirms supplier is active, bank details are verified, and no sanctions or blacklist flags exist. Anti-bribery and KYS check applied.

nodes.name: Delegation of Authority Confirmation

thresholds.parameter: PO value vs approved authority level
thresholds.action: Escalate to next approval tier per Delegation of Authority matrix. Do not proceed until correct authority has approved.

nodes.notes: Confirms PO value is within the signatory's approved authority level per the current Delegation of Authority (DoA) policy.

nodes.name: Payment Execution & Remittance

thresholds.action: Halt payment and notify AP Supervisor and Treasury Manager if value discrepancy detected.

nodes.notes: AP executes bank transfer and issues remittance advice to supplier. Payment reference is reconciled against PO number in ERP.

nodes.name: Payment Terms & Scheduling Confirmation

thresholds.parameter: Payment due date vs supplier terms
thresholds.action: Escalate to Treasury Manager if payment scheduling breaches agreed supplier terms.

nodes.notes: Confirms payment due date against supplier contract terms (e.g. Net 30/60). Schedules payment run accordingly.

nodes.name: Treasury Payment Instruction Issuance
nodes.notes: Formal payment instruction issued to AP via ERP, including payment amount, bank transfer details, value date and PO reference.

nodes.name: Duplicate Payment Check

thresholds.action: Immediately halt payment. Escalate to AP Supervisor and Treasury Manager. Log incident for audit trail.

nodes.notes: CCP — ERP system checks for duplicate invoice number, supplier reference and payment amount combination. Any match halts processing immediately.

nodes.name: Payment Approval & Dual Authorisation

thresholds.action: Do not release payment. Obtain second authorisation per dual-control policy.

nodes.notes: Dual authorisation required for all payments above defined threshold per internal controls policy. Single-signatory payments above threshold are a control violation.

nodes.name: Tax & Withholding Compliance Check

thresholds.action: Halt payment. Notify Tax Manager for correction. Do not release until tax treatment is confirmed.

nodes.notes: Validates VAT, withholding tax and any applicable statutory deductions per local tax regulations before payment release.

nodes.name: Remittance Advice Issuance
nodes.notes: Remittance advice issued to supplier via email or supplier portal confirming payment amount, date, PO reference and invoice number.

nodes.name: ERP Reconciliation & Ledger Update

thresholds.action: Raise reconciliation exception. Notify AP Supervisor and Treasury Analyst. Investigate and resolve within 48 hours.

nodes.notes: ERP automatically posts payment to supplier ledger and updates bank account balance. Reconciliation report generated for Finance Director review.

nodes.name: Payment Audit Trail & Record Closure
nodes.notes: Full audit trail archived: PO, GRN, invoice, match result, approvals, payment instruction, bank confirmation and remittance. Closed record made available to Internal Audit.

nodes.name: Production & Supply Planning Process
nodes.notes: Trigger: start of monthly planning cycle. Initiates both sub-processes sequentially.

nodes.name: Sub-Process 1: Demand & Production Planning
nodes.notes: Sub-process boundary: Demand & Production Planning. Owned by Planning department.

nodes.name: Receive & Validate Demand Signal

thresholds.parameter: Forecast accuracy vs prior month actuals
thresholds.action: Escalate to Planning Manager for manual demand review before proceeding
Reject signal and request refresh from Commercial team

nodes.notes: Demand signal sourced from ERP/S&OP output. Validate completeness, SKU coverage and forecast age before proceeding to MPS.

nodes.name: Demand Signal Acceptable?
nodes.notes: YES → proceed to MPS generation. NO → return to Supply Planner for demand signal correction. Max 1 retry loop before Planning Manager escalation.

nodes.name: Generate Master Production Schedule (MPS)
nodes.notes: MPS generated in ERP using validated demand signal. Output: time-phased production quantities by SKU and production line.

nodes.name: Validate Production Capacity Against MPS

thresholds.action: Flag capacity breach to Planning Manager. MPS must be revised or alternative capacity sourced before lock.

thresholds.parameter: Unplanned downtime allowance built into schedule
thresholds.action: If buffer below 5%, Production Scheduler must flag risk to Plant Manager before MPS approval.

nodes.notes: CCP: capacity overcommitment at this stage cannot be corrected once supplier orders are placed downstream. Human confirmation required. Loop confirm enabled.

nodes.name: Capacity Adequate?
nodes.notes: YES → approve MPS and proceed. NO → return to S4 for MPS revision. Maximum 2 revision cycles before escalation to Planning Manager and Plant Manager joint review.

nodes.name: Approve & Lock Master Production Schedule
nodes.notes: Formal MPS lock. Dual sign-off required: Planning Manager + Plant Manager. Locked MPS triggers Sub-Process 2 (Supply & Materials Planning). Record retained in ERP.

nodes.name: Handoff: Locked MPS to Supply & Materials Planning
nodes.notes: Ownership transfers from Planning to Procurement/Supply. Locked MPS and capacity-confirmed schedule transmitted to Procurement via ERP. Sub-Process 1 closes here.

nodes.name: Sub-Process 2: Supply & Materials Planning
nodes.notes: Sub-process boundary: Supply & Materials Planning. Owned by Procurement department. Triggered by locked MPS from S8.

nodes.name: Run Material Requirements Planning (MRP)
nodes.notes: ERP-generated MRP run against locked MPS. Output: planned purchase orders, replenishment requirements, and material shortage report by RM/PM code.

nodes.name: Review & Validate MRP Output

thresholds.action: Any coverage gap must be escalated to Procurement Manager within 24 hours for expedite or substitution review.

thresholds.parameter: Number of critical material shortages flagged
thresholds.action: Any critical shortage triggers immediate escalation to Planning Manager and Plant Manager for MPS impact assessment.

nodes.notes: Buyer reviews MRP output for exceptions, shortages, and lead time conflicts. Critical shortages must not proceed without escalation.

nodes.name: Material Availability Confirmed?
nodes.notes: YES → proceed to supplier order placement. NO → escalate to joint Planning/Procurement review for MPS re-sequencing or expedite action. Document resolution.

nodes.name: Issue Purchase Orders to Suppliers

thresholds.parameter: PO issued within lead time window
thresholds.action: Late PO issuance must be approved by Procurement Manager with documented risk impact.

nodes.notes: POs issued via ERP against approved supplier list. All POs require Procurement Manager authorisation above defined value threshold (assumed ≥£10,000).

nodes.name: Confirm Supplier Delivery Commitments

thresholds.action: Unconfirmed POs after 2 days: Buyer to chase. After 4 days: Procurement Manager escalates or activates secondary supplier.

thresholds.parameter: On-time delivery commitment vs required date
thresholds.action: Any late delivery commitment must be assessed for MPS impact by Supply Planner within 24 hours.

nodes.notes: All POs must have written supplier confirmation of delivery date. Unconfirmed orders are a material planning risk — monitored weekly thereafter.

nodes.name: Supply Plan Review & Sign-Off
nodes.notes: Formal supply plan sign-off. All POs placed, supplier confirmations received, and material coverage validated. Output distributed to Planning and Production for execution readiness.

nodes.name: Production & Supply Planning Process Complete
nodes.informed: Plant Manager, Procurement Manager, Supply Planner, Production Scheduler, Buyer
nodes.notes: Process close. Locked MPS and confirmed supply plan handed to Production Scheduling and Warehouse for execution. Monthly cycle complete. Next cycle triggered Day 1 of following month.

nodes.name: Customer Places Order
nodes.notes: Order received via Shopify storefront. Triggers fulfilment workflow automatically.

nodes.name: Order Confirmation & Payment Verification

thresholds.action: Flag order and hold — do not proceed to pick

nodes.notes: Shopify validates payment gateway response. Failed payments must not proceed to warehouse.

nodes.name: Payment Confirmed?
nodes.notes: YES → proceed to stock check. NO → notify customer, cancel or retry payment.

nodes.name: Order Transmitted to WMS
nodes.notes: Shopify pushes confirmed order details to WMS via integration. Pick list generated automatically.

nodes.name: Stock Availability Check

thresholds.action: Trigger back-order process — notify customer of delay

nodes.notes: WMS checks real-time inventory against order line items.

nodes.name: All Items In Stock?
nodes.notes: YES → proceed to picking. NO → initiate back-order for out-of-stock items.

nodes.name: Initiate Back-Order
nodes.notes: Back-order raised in WMS. Customer notified of delay via Shopify automated email. Partial fulfilment considered if some items are in stock.

nodes.name: Order Picking

thresholds.action: Re-pick incorrect items before proceeding to packing

nodes.notes: Picker follows WMS-generated pick list. Barcode scanning recommended to validate each item picked.

nodes.name: Pick Verification

thresholds.action: Halt packing — return incorrect items, re-pick correct items before proceeding

nodes.notes: CCP — incorrect items shipped cannot be recovered without customer return and re-dispatch. Full order verification against pick list required before packing commences.

nodes.name: Order Packing
nodes.notes: Items packed securely. Packing slip inserted. Packaging standard must protect items in transit.

nodes.name: Shipping Label Generation
nodes.notes: Courier integration generates shipping label and tracking number automatically. Label applied to parcel.

nodes.name: Dispatch & Handoff to Courier

thresholds.action: Escalate to Operations Manager — SLA breach risk

nodes.notes: Physical handoff of parcels to courier driver. Proof of collection obtained. Customer notified of dispatch with tracking number via Shopify.

nodes.name: Shipment in Transit

thresholds.action: Monitor tracking — flag delayed shipments to Operations Manager

nodes.notes: Courier manages delivery. Tracking updates fed back via integration. Customer can self-serve tracking via Shopify notification.

nodes.name: Delivery Attempted?
nodes.notes: YES → delivered successfully, proceed to order closure. NO → courier manages re-delivery or returns parcel to warehouse.

nodes.name: Failed Delivery — Return to Warehouse
nodes.notes: Courier returns undelivered parcel to warehouse. Warehouse team inspects and restocks or re-dispatches. Customer contacted to arrange re-delivery or refund.

nodes.name: Order Closure & Records Update
nodes.notes: Order marked as fulfilled in Shopify and WMS. Inventory levels updated. Delivery confirmation recorded. Process complete.

nodes.name: A1 — Order Management
nodes.notes: Process group anchor for all order management activities in Sales department.

nodes.name: B1 — Inbound & Inventory Management
nodes.timing: On stock receipt or replenishment trigger
nodes.notes: Process group anchor for all inbound goods receipt and inventory control activities.

nodes.name: A2 — Customer Support
nodes.notes: Process group anchor for post-sale customer support, enquiries and escalations.

nodes.name: C2 — Reporting & Audit
nodes.notes: Process group anchor for financial reporting, management accounts and internal/external audit.

nodes.name: A1.1 — Order Intake & Validation
nodes.notes: Sub-process covering receipt of customer orders via all channels and validation of order data completeness.

nodes.name: B1.1 — Goods Receipt & Inspection
nodes.notes: Sub-process for receiving, counting and inspecting inbound stock against purchase orders.

nodes.name: A1.2 — Order Confirmation & Communication
nodes.notes: Sub-process covering customer confirmation, ETA communication and internal order release.

nodes.name: C1.2 — Bank Reconciliation
nodes.notes: Sub-process for daily reconciliation of payment gateway settlements against bank receipts.

nodes.name: A2.1 — Enquiry & Complaint Handling
nodes.notes: Sub-process for receiving, triaging and resolving customer enquiries and complaints.

nodes.name: C2.1 — Management Reporting
nodes.notes: Sub-process for producing monthly P&L, cash flow and KPI reporting pack for senior leadership.

nodes.name: A2.2 — Returns & Refunds
nodes.notes: Sub-process for managing customer return requests, RMA issuance and refund authorisation.

nodes.name: C2.2 — Audit & Compliance
nodes.notes: Sub-process for internal controls audit, external statutory audit and regulatory compliance review.

nodes.name: A1.1.1 — Receive & Log Incoming Order
nodes.notes: System auto-logs order with timestamp, customer ID, SKUs, quantities and channel source.

nodes.name: A1.1.2 — Validate Order Completeness

thresholds.action: Contact customer to resolve missing data before proceeding

nodes.notes: Check for complete shipping address, contact details, SKU validity and quantity. Reject incomplete orders.

nodes.name: C1.1.2 — Verify Payment Against Order Value

thresholds.action: Hold order; notify Finance Manager and Sales Coordinator to investigate before release

nodes.notes: System cross-checks captured payment amount against order total. Zero tolerance on variance.

nodes.name: A1.2.1 — Send Order Confirmation to Customer
nodes.notes: Automated confirmation email/SMS with order number, items, and estimated delivery window.

nodes.name: C1.2.1 — Download & Match Settlement Report
nodes.notes: Export daily settlement file from payment gateway. Auto-match against bank statement lines in accounting system.

nodes.name: A1.2.2 — Release Order to Fulfilment
nodes.notes: Formal handoff of validated order to Warehouse/Fulfilment. Triggers WMS pick task creation.

nodes.name: C1.2.2 — Investigate & Clear Unmatched Items

thresholds.action: All unmatched items must be resolved within 24 hours; escalate to Finance Manager if unresolved

nodes.notes: Review exception report. Investigate duplicate payments, missing settlements or timing differences. Clear to zero daily.

nodes.name: A2.1.1 — Log & Triage Customer Enquiry
nodes.notes: Log enquiry type (delivery, product, billing), assign priority, link to order ID.

nodes.name: C2.1.1 — Compile Monthly Financial Pack
nodes.notes: Pull actuals from accounting system. Compile P&L, balance sheet, cash flow and variance commentary.

nodes.name: A2.1.2 — Resolve or Escalate Enquiry

thresholds.action: Escalate to Customer Service Manager if unresolved within 48 hours

nodes.notes: YES: resolve at agent level. NO: escalate to manager or relevant department.

nodes.name: C2.1.2 — Review & Approve Financial Pack

thresholds.action: Escalate to CFO if pack not approved by working day 5

nodes.notes: Finance Manager reviews for accuracy and completeness. CFO signs off before board distribution.

nodes.name: A2.2.1 — Assess Return Eligibility

thresholds.action: Reject return request outside policy window; notify customer

nodes.notes: Verify return is within 30-day policy window, product is unopened or defective, and order ID matches.

nodes.name: C2.2.1 — Internal Controls Review
nodes.notes: Review all financial controls against policy. Document findings, remediation actions and sign-off.

nodes.name: A2.2.2 — Issue RMA & Initiate Refund
nodes.notes: Issue Return Merchandise Authorisation number. Trigger refund workflow in Finance. Notify warehouse to expect return.

nodes.name: C2.2.2 — Statutory Audit Support & Filing

thresholds.action: Immediate escalation to CFO and Legal if statutory deadline at risk

nodes.notes: Provide schedules and workpapers to external auditors. Manage queries. File statutory accounts on time.
